/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/EngineUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/SceneDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/TemplateDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/ComponentDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_engine.dir/ParticleSystem.cpp.o -o game_engine   -L/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL2/lib  -L/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL_image/lib  -L/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL_mixer/lib  -L/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL2_ttf/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL_image/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL_mixer/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/armandgago/EECS498/game_engine_gagoa/SDL2_ttf/lib liblua_lib.a -framework SDL2 -framework SDL2_image -framework SDL2_mixer -framework SDL2_ttf
